reasoning: The limiter in your performance is your lactate clearance, reflected by a 9.3% decline from your 5- to 20-minute power. Your last ride was at 71% FTP, showing aerobic activity, but we need to build upon it for the demands of the Alpine Loop. This workout targets improved lactate clearance and aerobic endurance.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x (5 minutes at 102% FTP [242-256W] over, 7 minutes at 85% FTP [201-209W] under), focus on endurance and recovery between efforts

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
